When enabled, every blocked submission i: Kad iespējots, katrs bloķētais iesniegums tiek reģistrēts ar mašīnlasāmu iemesla kodu un cilvēklasāmu paskaidrojumu par bloķēšanas iemeslu. Tas ļauj precīzi analizēt, kuras aizsardzības metodes darbojas un kāpēc.
When enabled, the plugin tracks all loca: Kad iespējots, spraudnis izseko visas lokālās aizsardzības pārbaudes un novērtē, cik daudz papildu botu SilentShield API būtu notvēris. Dati netiek sūtīti ārēji — visa analīze ir lokāla. Skatiet rezultātus analītikas lapā.
With SilentShield API you'd also get:: Ar SilentShield API jūs arī iegūtu:
You can import a predefined blacklist fr: Jūs varat importēt iepriekš definētu melno sarakstu no mums. Iepriekš definētajā sarakstā ir aptuveni 40 000 ierakstu vairākās valodās.
You do not have permission to access thi: Jums nav atļaujas piekļūt šim galapunktam.
You received this email because weekly r: Jūs saņēmāt šo e-pastu, jo iknedēļas pārskati ir iespējoti vietnē
Your IP is blocked from submitting this: Jūsu IP ir bloķēta no šīs veidlapas iesniegšanas.
Your SilentShield API trial ends in %d d: Jūsu SilentShield API izmēģinājums beidzas pēc %d dienām. Saglabājiet AI darbinātu aizsardzību savām veidlapām.
Your SilentShield API trial has expired: Jūsu SilentShield API izmēģinājums ir beidzies
Jūsu SilentShield API izmēģinājums ir beidzies. Jūsu veidlapas ir atgrieztas atsevišķajā režīmā. Jauniniet, lai saglabātu uzlaboto aizsardzību.
Jūsu veidlapas ir atgrieztas atsevišķajā režīmā. Jauniniet, lai saglabātu AI darbinātu aizsardzību.
Your forms are receiving heavy spam traf: Jūsu veidlapas saņem lielu surogātpasta trafiku. SilentShield API izmanto AI uzvedības analīzi, lai notvertu botus, kurus uz noteikumiem balstīta aizsardzība palaiž garām — tostarp headless pārlūkus un automatizētus skriptus.
Test premium features for 14 days — no c: Izmēģiniet premium funkcijas 14 dienas — kredītkarte nav nepieciešama
API shadow mode is active — submissions: API ēnu režīms ir aktīvs — iesūtījumi tiek pārbaudīti ar API paralēli
All selected entries will be resent via: Visi atlasītie ieraksti tiks atkārtoti nosūtīti ar wp_mail().
All selected mail log entries will be pe: Visi atlasītie e-pasta žurnāla ieraksti tiks neatgriezeniski dzēsti.
Send anonymous usage data to SilentShiel: Sūtīt anonīmus lietošanas datus uz SilentShield
Limits repeated form submissions per IP: Ierobežo atkārtotus formu iesūtījumus katrai IP
Subject: Tēma
Block log with IP, user agent, reason: Bloķēšanas žurnāls ar IP, pārlūka aģentu, iemeslu
Block Log and Audit Log Settings: Bloķēšanas žurnāla un audita žurnāla iestatījumi
Blocks submissions from clients without: Bloķē iesūtījumus no klientiem bez JavaScript atbalsta
Configure captcha modules and detection: Konfigurēt captcha moduļus un noteikšanas metodes
Content rules, IP management, whitelist/: Satura noteikumi, IP pārvaldība, baltais/melnais saraksts
GDPR Notice: The mail log stores persona: GDPR paziņojums: E-pasta žurnāls saglabā personas datus (e-pasta adreses, ziņojumu saturu). Pārliecinieties, ka tas ir saderīgs ar jūsu privātuma politiku.
The analytics page only shows data when: Die Analytics-Seite zeigt nur Daten an, wenn "Erweitertes Tracking" in den Einstellungen aktiviert ist. Ohne diese Option werden keine Block-Events erfasst.
These email addresses skip all protectio: Šīs e-pasta adreses izlaiž visus aizsardzības mehānismus
This action cannot be undone. Message co: Šo darbību nevar atsaukt. Ziņojuma saturs un formas dati tiks neatgriezeniski dzēsti.
Emails, IPs and roles that skip protecti: E-pasta adreses, IP un lomas, kas izlaiž aizsardzību
Settings can be configured on 3 levels:: Iestatījumus var konfigurēt 3 līmeņos: Globālais, Integrācija, Individuālā forma. Zemāks līmenis pārraksta augstāko.
Detects bots that submit forms in under: Atklāj botus, kas iesniedz formas ātrāk par %s milisekundēm
Atklāj botus, kas iesniedz formas ātrāk par X milisekundēm
Log sent and blocked form messages: Reģistrēt nosūtītos un bloķētos formu ziņojumus
Delete saved data selectively or complet: Dzēst saglabātos datus selektīvi vai pilnībā
IP addresses that are always blocked: IP adreses, kas vienmēr tiek bloķētas
I understand that %d entries will be per: Es saprotu, ka %d ieraksti tiks neatgriezeniski dzēsti
I understand that this entry will be per: Es saprotu, ka šis ieraksts tiks neatgriezeniski dzēsts
Label: Etiķete
Overrides disabled — integration setting: Pārrakstīšana atspējota — tiek piemēroti integrācijas iestatījumi
Overrides disabled — global settings app: Pārrakstīšana atspējota — tiek piemēroti globālie iestatījumi
Protects forms with various captcha meth: Aizsargā formas ar dažādām captcha metodēm
URL limits, BBCode detection, word black: URL ierobežojumi, BBCode noteikšana, vārdu melnais saraksts
Compares API results with local results: Salīdzina API rezultātus ar lokālajiem rezultātiem, neietekmējot apmeklētājus
This page could not be loaded. Please tr: Šo lapu nevarēja ielādēt. Lūdzu, mēģiniet vēlreiz.
No internet connection — changes cannot: Nav interneta savienojuma — izmaiņas nevar saglabāt.
AI-powered spam protection — start for f: AI darbināta surogātpasta aizsardzība — sāciet bez maksas
Manage account, API keys & statistics: Konta pārvaldība, API atslēgas un statistika
Create a free SilentShield account with: Izveidojiet bezmaksas SilentShield kontu ar AI uzvedības analīzi un pārlūka pirkstu nospiedumu. Iekļauj zīmolvedību — kredītkarte nav nepieciešama.
Plugin (local) vs. Free Plan vs. Pro: Spraudnis (lokāls) vs. Bezmaksas plāns vs. Pro
This affects %s entries and cannot be un: Tas ietekmē %s ierakstus un to nevar atsaukt.
A caching plugin serves an outdated logi: A caching plugin serves an outdated login page
Add your IP address to the whitelist: Add your IP address to the whitelist
After activation, SilentShield immediate: After activation, SilentShield immediately protects all detected forms. No configuration required.
All logged-in users are never checked: All logged-in users are never checked
All logs have configurable retention per: All logs have configurable retention periods with automatic deletion
Automatically checks whether the browser: Automatically checks whether the browser can execute JavaScript. Real visitors do not notice anything. Bots that submit forms without a browser are blocked.
Before using the API for decisions, you: Before using the API for decisions, you can enable Shadow Mode. API results are only logged but not used for blocking. This lets you compare how the API performs versus local modules.
Blocks requests without a valid browser: Blocks requests without a valid browser (User-Agent). Normal visitors are never affected.
Blocks spam words, links and BBCode: Blocks spam words, links and BBCode
Blocks submissions containing specific w: Blocks submissions containing specific words. Greedy mode also catches partial matches.
Blocks submissions containing specific words or phrases. Must be enabled first under Settings > Content Rules.
Blocks submissions that are too fast: Blocks submissions that are too fast
Blocks submissions with too many links: Blocks submissions with too many links
Check under Analytics which module block: Check under Analytics which module blocks
Check under Settings if the integration: Check under Settings if the integration for your form plugin is enabled
Completely blocks specific IP addresses. These IPs cannot submit any forms. Enter one IP per line.
Disable the captcha for checkout under F: Disable the captcha for checkout under Forms > WooCommerce Checkout
Displays a challenge in the form that on: Displays a challenge in the form that only humans can solve.
Each integration can be enabled or disab: Each integration can be enabled or disabled individually under Settings.
Emergency: Rename the plugin folder via: Emergency: Rename the plugin folder via FTP/SFTP to deactivate
Enable additional protection modules (IP: Enable additional protection modules (IP Rate Limiting, Content Filters)
Enable the word blacklist with typical s: Enable the word blacklist with typical spam terms
Enter IP addresses that should skip all: Enter IP addresses that should skip all checks. One IP per line.
Enter email addresses that should skip a: Enter email addresses that should skip all checks. One email per line. If any form field contains a whitelisted email, the entire submission is allowed.
Everything you need to know about protec: Everything you need to know about protecting your forms.
How long an IP is blocked (default: 3600: How long an IP is blocked (default: 3600 = 1 hour)
I cannot log in - SilentShield blocks my: I cannot log in - SilentShield blocks my login
If the API is unreachable, all local pro: If the API is unreachable, all local protection modules continue to work normally. There is no loss of protection. A notice appears in the admin area.
Increase the timer time (checkout takes: Increase the timer time (checkout takes longer than a contact form)
JavaScript is disabled in your browser o: JavaScript is disabled in your browser or a browser plugin blocks the script
Legitimate customers are blocked at WooC: Legitimate customers are blocked at WooCommerce Checkout
Logs all administrative changes: setting: Logs all administrative changes: settings modified, plugin activated/deactivated, API errors, rate limit hits.
Measures the time between page load and: Measures the time between page load and form submission. If a form is submitted in under 0.5 seconds (impossible for humans), it is blocked.
My form does not show a captcha: My form does not show a captcha
Or add the page URL under \"Custom Asset: Or add the page URL under "Custom Asset Loading URLs"
Prerequisite: Detailed tracking must be: Prerequisite: Detailed tracking must be enabled under Settings.
Prevents the same form from being submit: Prevents the same form from being submitted multiple times in a row (e.g. by double-clicking).
Shows at a glance: number of checked, al: Shows at a glance: number of checked, allowed and blocked submissions, active protection modules, and recent blocks.
SilentShield automatically protects your: SilentShield automatically protects your WordPress forms from spam and bots. The plugin works invisibly in the background and combines multiple protection mechanisms:
SilentShield is GDPR compliant: no cooki: SilentShield is GDPR compliant: no cookies, no tracking, no external services (except the optional SilentShield API).
Stores IP addresses only as hashes (not: Stores IP addresses only as hashes (not in plain text) in logs
Switch the captcha method from Honeypot: Switch the captcha method from Honeypot to Math or Image
The API runs alongside all local protect: The API runs alongside all local protection features. Captcha, timer, JS protection etc. remain active. The API adds an additional layer of protection.
The Mail Log stores personal data. Make: The Mail Log stores personal data. Make sure this is compatible with your privacy policy. All logs are automatically deleted after the configured retention period (default: 30 days).
The SilentShield API is an optional clou: The SilentShield API is an optional cloud service for advanced bot detection. It analyzes visitor behavior (mouse movements, typing patterns etc.) and detects bots more reliably.
The SilentShield API is optional and mus: The SilentShield API is optional and must be explicitly enabled
The whitelist always takes priority over: The whitelist always takes priority over the blacklist. If an IP is on both lists, it will be allowed through.
Tip: Honeypot mode is completely invisib: Tip: Honeypot mode is completely invisible to visitors - ideal if you do not want a visible captcha.
Use the SilentShield API for behavior-ba: Use the SilentShield API for behavior-based detection
What can be customized per form?: What can be customized per form?
What happens during an API outage?: What happens during an API outage?
When enabled, limits how often an IP add: When enabled, limits how often an IP address can submit forms.
When enabled, logs all form submissions: When enabled, logs all form submissions (sent and blocked) with sender, recipient and content.
Whitelisted users, IP addresses or email: Whitelisted users, IP addresses or email addresses skip all protection checks. They will never see a captcha and will never be blocked.
You can customize protection settings fo: You can customize protection settings for individual integrations or even individual forms, without changing the global settings.
